scripts.check:server: node --check server/src/index.js && node --check server/src/socket/presence.js && node --check server/src/services/cleanup.js && node --check server/src/services/redis.js && node --check server/src/services/storage.js && node --check server/src/middleware/validation.js && node --check server/src/routes/upload.js && node --check server/src/routes/files.js && node --check server/src/routes/presence.js && node --check server/src/routes/shares.js && node --check server/src/routes/health.js && node --check server/src/lib/presenceAccess.js && node --check server/src/lib/expiry.js
scripts.verify: npm run check:server && npm run test && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:infra
